questions.question: Who won the 2024 US presidential election?
questions.explanation: Donald Trump won the 2024 presidential election, defeating Kamala Harris.

questions.question: Which hurricane struck Florida in October 2024, weeks after Hurricane Helene?
questions.explanation: Hurricane Milton made landfall in Florida on October 9, 2024.

questions.question: Which Nobel Prize in Literature was awarded to which author in 2024?
questions.explanation: South Korean author Han Kang won the 2024 Nobel Prize in Literature.

questions.question: Who did Trump select as his running mate for the 2024 election?
questions.explanation: J.D. Vance, Ohio senator, was Trump's VP pick.

questions.question: Which country's long-time rebel group toppled the Assad regime in December 2024?
questions.explanation: Syrian rebels led by HTS toppled Bashar al-Assad's regime in December 2024.

questions.question: Where did Bashar al-Assad flee to after his regime fell?
questions.explanation: Assad fled to Russia after his government collapsed in December 2024.

questions.question: Which major CEO stepped down from Intel in December 2024?
questions.explanation: Pat Gelsinger resigned as Intel CEO in December 2024.

questions.question: Which country elected its first female president in October 2024?
questions.explanation: Claudia Sheinbaum took office as Mexico's first female president on October 1, 2024.

questions.question: What was the global significance of December 2024 in terms of climate?
options: 2024 became the hottest year on record
questions.explanation: 2024 was confirmed as the hottest year on record, surpassing 2023.

questions.question: Which South Korean president declared martial law briefly in December 2024?
questions.explanation: President Yoon declared martial law on December 3, 2024, but it was overturned within hours.

questions.question: The Republicans won control of which chamber of Congress in the 2024 elections?
questions.explanation: Republicans won both the House and Senate in the 2024 elections.

questions.question: Which company launched the world's most powerful rocket, Starship, on its 6th test flight in November 2024?
questions.explanation: SpaceX's Starship completed increasingly successful test flights in 2024.

questions.question: Which city was selected to host the 2036 Summer Olympics?
questions.explanation: As of late 2024, no host city for 2036 had been officially selected yet.

questions.question: Google DeepMind and Demis Hassabis won the Nobel Prize in which field in 2024?
questions.explanation: Demis Hassabis and John Jumper won the Nobel Prize in Chemistry for AlphaFold.

questions.question: Which social media alternative gained significant traction as a Twitter/X competitor in 2024?
questions.explanation: Bluesky gained millions of users in 2024 as users migrated from X.
